package.name: vive_libsurvive_ros
package.description: Steam-free HTC VIVE Tracker / Lighthouse tracking for ROS1 (Noetic) using libsurvive. Publishes PoseStamped + TF (and optionally TwistStamped) for multiple trackers and base stations without SteamVR / OpenVR. Designed for 3 trackers (2 via dongle, 1 via direct USB) and 2x SteamVR 2.0 base stations.
